(I) These rules may be called the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Amendment Rules, 2016. . (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rilles, 2008 (hereafter referred to as the said rules) in rule 2, after clause (hb), the following clause shall be inserted, nameiy:-. (he) "pre-paid payment instrument" ineans the instrument as defined by Reserve Bank ofIndia; 3. In the said rules, in rule 6, in sub-rule (3) after the words "cash or through" the words "pre-paid payment instruments," shall be inserted. [F. No. H-25016/01/2014-Toll (VoW)] DAKSHIT A DAS, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India. Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) published in the Gazette of India, vide G.S.R. 838(£). dated the 5th December, 2008 and subsequently amended vide G.S.R. 950(£), dated the 3'd December, 2010; G.S.R. 15(E), dated the 12th January, 2011; G.S.R. 756(£), dated the dh October, 2011, G.S.R. 778(E). dated the 16th December, 2013; G.S.R. 26(E), dated the 16tbJanuary, 2014; G.S.R. No. 831(E), dated the 21s1 November. 2014; G.S.R. 02(E), dated the 29th December, 2014; G.S.R. 220(E), elated the 23,d March, 2015 and G.S.R. 585(E), elated the 8th.June, 2016.
